expectations.text: Produces an actual boilerplate paragraph, not clarifying questions
Keeps it tight (roughly one short paragraph suitable for a footer/press use)
Includes a concrete, specific detail rather than only vague adjectives
expectations.evidence: Comes-to-you model, eco/low-water method, gallons saved, vehicles served — concrete specifics.

expectations.text: States an assumption about audience or service specifics in one line because details are missing
Does NOT treat this as a Gate A strategy statement requiring questions first
